title: The Jawaharlal Nehru University Act, 1966
full_text: The Jawaharlal Nehru University Act, 1966 जवाहरलाल नेहरु विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1966 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196653 Act Number: 53 Enactment Date: 1966-12-22 Act Year: 1966 Short Title: The Jawaharlal Nehru University Act, 1966 Hindi Title: जवाहरलाल नेहरु विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1966 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a university in Delhi. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 22-04-1969 Notification: 22nd April 1969, vide Notification No. S.O. 1525, dated 21st April, 1969, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
